title: Senior Consultant
description:
Avensys Services Pte Ltd is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our services include enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation, and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail, and supply chain.

We are currently looking to hire an Senior Consultant. This is an exciting opportunity to expand your skill set and achieve job satisfaction and work-life balance. I've included more details below.

Job Description:

To drive transformation of business processes leveraging agentic AI technologies, reimagining workflows for enhanced automation, adaptability, and efficiency. The role involves analyzing existing processes, identifying opportunities for AI-driven improvements, and collaborating with stakeholders to redesign future-ready, AI-embedded workflows.

Key Responsibilities

• Analyze and document current business processes to uncover inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and opportunities for agentic AI integration that enable autonomous decision-making and dynamic pathway optimization.

• Lead workshops using design thinking to co-create AI-enabled process solutions aligned to business goals.

• Define and apply frameworks for use case assessment, including feasibility, value, and risk evaluation of AI-driven initiatives.

• Re-engineer end-to-end workflows from linear models to adaptive, agent-based ones, focusing on reducing manual interventions while increasing agility and outcome consistency.

• Collaborate cross-functionally with business stakeholders and technical teams to embed AI, automation, and digital tools into process designs.

• Measure process improvements using relevant KPIs and develop continuous improvement plans.

• Support governance and operating models that ensure scalable and sustainable AI process implementations.

Qualifications & Experience

• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in business administration, engineering, management, computer science, or related fields.

• Significant experience (typically 5-7+ years) in business process re-engineering with a track record of AI or automation project delivery.

• Expertise in agentic AI platforms, frameworks (e.g., LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen), and emerging AI orchestration technologies.

• Solid understanding of workflow redesign, process automation, and Lean/Six Sigma methodologies.

• Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

• Experience in running design thinking sessions, stakeholder engagement, and change management.

• Knowledge of relevant cloud services and AI lifecycle management (CI/CD, MLOps) is desirable.

Desired Skills

• Proactive ownership mindset and ability to navigate ambiguity in AI-driven transformations.

• Ability to translate complex AI capabilities into business value and measurable impact.

• Familiarity with AI governance, ethics, and compliance frameworks.

• Experience using agentic AI for operational improvements in finance, procurement, or technology operations preferred.

WHAT’S ON OFFER

You will be remunerated with an excellent base salary and entitled to attractive company benefits. Additionally, you will get the opportunity to enjoy a fun and collaborative work environment, alongside a strong career progression.

To submit your application, please apply online or email your UPDATED CV in Microsoft Word format to zayn.atif@aven-sys.com. Your interest will be treated with strict confidentiality.

CONSULTANT DETAILS
Consultant Name: Zayn Atif

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys Services' privacy policy.
